summary: UNO AAA backend + frontend regression PASSED. 6/6 backend tests (start shape, state, illegal play 400, draw, wild_pending + declare, spades reachable). Frontend: /spades cold-load exposes spades-aaa-lobby + spades-aaa-lobby-start-btn + legacy id; /uno renders lobby (uno-aaa-lobby, -start-btn, -back) with '108' + '500' house rules; /uno-aaa, /practice/play/uno, /multiplayer-uno, /multiplayer-uno/abc123 all redirect to /uno; game view shows spades-table[data-variant=neon, data-density=4p], uno-top-card, uno-draw-btn, uno-hand-strip, cards prefixed uno-card-<color>-<value> (e.g. uno-card-yellow-7); seat pills N/E/W=7 each, south hidden by design.
critical_code_review_comments: uno_game.is_legal treats wild4 identically to plain wild (always playable). Official UNO requires the 'no-legal-color' challenge rule for wild4; this is a known simplification documented in the engine header and is fine for practice mode — mention in roadmap.

uno_practice.py uses an in-process _MATCHES: Dict — state is lost on server restart and is not horizontally scalable. Acceptable for single-pod practice mode; migrate to Mongo/Redis if multiplayer UNO ships.

start endpoint draw_pile_count can range 77-79 (not the reviewer-advertised 79-80) because a starter Draw2 forces south to draw 2 from the pile during start_new_hand. Updated assertion range in test to 77-79. No code change needed — behavior is correct.

Note: Playwright detected 8 elements matching uno-card-*; 7 are hand cards + 1 is the top discard card (both use the uno-card-<color>-<value> prefix). Consider scoping to '[data-testid="uno-hand-strip"] [data-testid^="uno-card-"]' if strict hand-count tests are added.
seed_data_creation: None — demo-login auto-provisions guest; UNO matches are in-memory.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: /api/uno-practice/{start,state,play,declare,draw,new-hand} all work. Deck=108, starter reshuffled if wild4, pending_color always valid. Illegal plays → HTTP 400 'Illegal play'. Wild requires declared_color (or 200 with wild_pending=true + follow-up /declare). Frontend: /uno is canonical; legacy /uno-aaa, /practice/play/uno, /multiplayer-uno, /multiplayer-uno/:code all Navigate replace. /spades page wrapper carries both data-testid='spades-aaa-lobby' (primary) and the legacy id for back-compat; start button has data-testid='spades-aaa-lobby-start-btn'. Full 9-AAA-room regression (bid-whist/hearts/crazy-eights/go-fish/gin-rummy/rummy/war) not re-run here — previously green in iteration_jan_2026_final_aaa_ginrummy_rummy_war.json and no routes/code touching those rooms in this diff.
